description: Add LLM verification layer for fuzzy name matches in contact resolution pipeline. Before creating action cards for fuzzy matches (Tier 3), use gpt-5-mini to analyze contact metadata and decide if contacts are the same person.

decisions.skip_llm_for: Tier 1 (handle match) and Tier 2 (exact name) - deterministic, no LLM needed

documentation.title: Vercel AI SDK - Structured Data Generation
documentation.reason: Pattern for generateObject with Zod schemas - already used in generate-action.ts

documentation.title: OpenAI Structured Outputs
documentation.reason: Understanding JSON mode and function calling for reliable structured responses

tasks.description: Create LLM fuzzy match decision module with Zod schema
steps: Create packages/ai/src/contact-resolution/llm-match.ts
Define ContactMatchInput type: { contact1: { displayName, company?, handles[] }, contact2: { displayName, company?, handles[] }, fuzzyScore: number }
Define FuzzyMatchDecision Zod schema: { samePerson: boolean, confidence: number (0-1), reasoning: string }
Add system prompt for contact matching decision
Export decideFuzzyMatch(input: ContactMatchInput): Promise<FuzzyMatchDecision>
Verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint - must pass

tasks.description: Export new module from packages/ai index
steps: Edit packages/ai/src/contact-resolution/index.ts to export from ./llm-match
Edit packages/ai/src/index.ts to include contact-resolution exports if not present
Verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint - must pass
Import openai provider and FAST_MODEL from ../openai
Import generateObject from 'ai' and z from 'zod'
Build prompt with both contacts' names, handles, companies, and fuzzy score
Call generateObject with FuzzyMatchDecision schema
Return structured decision with samePerson, confidence, reasoning
Verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint - must pass

tasks.description: Add retry wrapper and error handling
steps: Create decideFuzzyMatchWithRetry(input, maxRetries=2): Promise<FuzzyMatchDecision>
Return safe default { samePerson: false, confidence: 0, reasoning: 'LLM failed' } on all retries exhausted
Use exponential backoff pattern from generate-action.ts
Verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint - must pass
Import decideFuzzyMatchWithRetry from @prm/ai in contactResolution.ts
In findMergeCandidatesForContact, after fuzzy match found, call LLM for verification
Only proceed to createMergeSuggestionInternal if samePerson=true AND confidence >= 0.70
Pass LLM reasoning to createMergeSuggestionInternal as reasoning parameter
Verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint - must pass

tasks.description: Add LLM source type to schema validators
steps: Edit packages/convex/convex/schema.ts mergeSourceValidator to add 'llm_fuzzy_match' literal
Update MatchResult type in contactResolution.ts to include 'llm_fuzzy_match' source
Update createMergeSuggestionInternal args to accept new source
Verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint - must pass

tasks.description: Update action card display to show LLM reasoning
steps: Confirm llmReason field already stored in actions table (exists per schema)
Confirm MergeCard component in packages/ui/src/components/contacts/merge-card.tsx displays reasoning
If reasoning not displayed, add it below confidence score in merge card UI
Verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint - must pass

tasks.description: Add unit tests for decideFuzzyMatch function
steps: Create packages/ai/src/contact-resolution/llm-match.test.ts
Mock generateObject from 'ai' using vi.mock
Test: same person with high confidence returns samePerson=true
Test: different people returns samePerson=false
Test: retry exhausted returns safe default
Test: handles empty/missing company gracefully
Run: cd packages/ai && pnpm test llm-match.test.ts
Verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint - must pass

tasks.description: Add integration tests for LLM-gated fuzzy matching flow
steps: Edit packages/convex/convex/__tests__/contactResolution.test.ts
Add test: fuzzy match below confidence threshold does NOT create action
Add test: fuzzy match with LLM samePerson=true creates action with llm_fuzzy_match source
Add test: fuzzy match with LLM samePerson=false does NOT create action
Mock the LLM call at the @prm/ai module boundary
Run: cd packages/convex && pnpm test contactResolution.test.ts
Verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint - must pass

tasks.description: Verify cost efficiency with token estimation
steps: Add token counting comment in llm-match.ts prompt section
Estimate: ~200-300 tokens input (2 contacts + prompt), ~50 tokens output
At gpt-5-mini pricing, ~$0.0001 per decision
Document expected cost per merge candidate in code comment
Verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint - must pass
